VAlert.description: Used to convey important message that has to stand out from the regular content. Easy to use with `type` for typical error, warning, info, and success callouts.

VApp.description: Root-level layout component resolving global theme and background color.

VAppBar.description: Toolbar wrapper dedicated to hold logo and the primary navigation.

VAppBarNavIcon.description: Pre-configured icon button for toggling navigation drawers, typically displayed as a hamburger menu in v-app-bar.

VAppBarTitle.description: Title area within v-app-bar, supporting truncation and custom content.

VAutocomplete.description: A flexible dropdown field with type-ahead. Helps users avoid scrolling through long lists of items in the dropdown (countries, states, people, etc.).

VAvatar.description: Container for image, icon, or initials used to represent a user or entity.

VAvatarGroup.description: Displays a collection of avatars in a compact stacked row or column with an overflow indicator.

VBadge.description: Supplemental status or counters next to avatars or navigation items. Content within the badge usually contains numbers or icons.

VBanner.description: Typically used to display concise message above the page content.

VBannerActions.description: Container for action buttons within a v-banner.

VBannerText.description: Text content area of a v-banner.

VBottomNavigation.description: An alternative to the sidebar. Primarily used for mobile applications.

VBottomSheet.description: A modified `v-dialog` that slides from the bottom.

VBreadcrumbs.description: Used as a navigational helper and represent hierarchy for pages.

VBreadcrumbsDivider.description: Used to define a divider between items in a `v-breadcrumbs` component.

VBreadcrumbsItem.description: Individual item within a v-breadcrumbs list.

VBtn.description: Replaces the standard html button with useful variants for various use cases. Includes robust set of options to customize internal content (text and icons).

VBtnGroup.description: Functional wrapper for many buttons, passing most of the props down. Building block of `v-btn-toggle`.

VBtnToggle.description: An alternative to radio group and checkboxes. A simple wrapper for `v-item-group` built specifically to work with `v-btn`.

VCalendar.description: Used to display information in a daily, weekly, monthly, or category view.

VCard.description: An alternative to `v-sheet` that provides a semantic interface for various types of cards holding title, general content, and optional actions, icon and image.

VCardActions.description: Container for action buttons at the bottom of a v-card.

VCardItem.description: Groups the title, subtitle, icon and image within a v-card.

VCardText.description: Primary text content area within a v-card.

VCarousel.description: Shows slides with simple navigation, support for horizontal and vertical orientation, auto-play control. Built on top of `v-window`.

VCheckbox.description: Typical form item that provides the ability to select from distinct values, convey approval/acknowledgement. Similar to `v-switch`.

VCheckboxBtn.description: A lightweight alternative to the `v-checkbox` component that is designed to be used inside of data tables, tree views and lists.

VChip.description: Used to style short contextual labels, tag-like selection within multi-select fields, or as an alternative to regular `v-btn`.

VChipGroup.description: Used to group the `v-chip` components for users to pick one or many options without a dedicated field wrapper.

VClassIcon.description: Renders an icon using a CSS class name.

VCode.description: Inline code snippet with monospace styling.

VCol.description: Grid column wrapper meant to be placed inside `v-row`.

VColorInput.description: Combines a text field with a color picker.

VColorPicker.description: Allows users to select a color using canvas, sliders, eye-dropper, and inputs.

VCombobox.description: A `v-text-field` enhanced with a dropdown list of suggestions. Unlike `v-autocomplete` whatever user types into the field is considered valid input.

VCommandPalette.description: A searchable dialog for quick navigation and action execution, opened using configurable keyboard shortcut.

VCommandPaletteItem.description: Subcomponent of `v-command-palette` representing a single item in the command list.

VComponentIcon.description: Renders an icon using a Vue component.

VConfirmEdit.description: Used to allow the user to verify their changes before they are committed. Used in pickers and custom menus.

VContainer.description: Represents page section that is usually centered and has predictable width (responds to screen width breakpoints).

VCounter.description: Represents characters count under the `v-text-field` and `v-textarea`. Not meant to be used as standalone component.

VDataIterator.description: Used for displaying arbitrary data, and shares a majority of its functionality with the `v-data-table` component.

VDataTable.description: Used for displaying tabular data. Supports searching, grouping, sorting and pagination.

VDataTableHeaders.description: Used to define the headers for a `v-data-table`.

VDataTableRow.description: Used to define a row for a `v-data-table`.

VDataTableRows.description: Used to define the rows for a `v-data-table`.

VDataTableServer.description: Specialized `v-data-table` to be combined with backend API that responds with single rows page to display.

VDataTableVirtual.description: Specialized `v-data-table` with built-in row virtualization to handle thousands of rows with minimal performance impact.

VDateInput.description: Combines a text field with a date picker.

VDatePicker.description: A fully featured date selection component that lets users select a single date, date range, limit available selection.

VDatePickerControls.description: Provides navigation controls for the `v-date-picker` component.

VDatePickerHeader.description: Displays the header of the `v-date-picker` component.

VDatePickerMonth.description: Displays a single month view for the `v-date-picker` component.

VDatePickerMonths.description: Displays a list of months for the `v-date-picker` component.

VDatePickerYears.description: Displays a list of years for the `v-date-picker` component.

VDateRangePicker.description: A dual-month date range picker built on top of `v-date-picker`. Shows two adjacent months side-by-side with a single shared range selection.

VDefaultsProvider.description: Allows you to provide specific default prop values to components in a section of your application.

VDialog.description: Used to display popup forms, confirmation cards or any information that should block user from interacting with the rest of the page.

VDialogBottomTransition.description: Slide-up transition for dialogs entering from the bottom edge.

VDialogTopTransition.description: Slide-down transition for dialogs entering from the top edge.

VDialogTransition.description: Transition effect tuned specifically for the `v-dialog` component.

VDivider.description: Used to visually separate sections of lists or layouts.

VEmptyState.description: Used to indicate that a section does not have any data to show yet or that a search yielded no results.

VExpandBothTransition.description: Expand/collapse transition in both vertical directions.

VExpandTransition.description: Vertical expand/collapse transition for revealing content.

VExpandXTransition.description: Horizontal expand/collapse transition for revealing content.

VExpansionPanels.description: Useful for reducing vertical space with large amounts of information.

VFab.description: Layout-aware component used to display a floating action button.

VFabTransition.description: Scale and rotate transition typically used for floating action buttons.

VField.description: A low level component for building specialized custom field components to work inside `v-form`.

VFileInput.description: A specialized form input for selecting files.

VFileUpload.description: Combines drag and drop area for files and a list that represents current selection.

VFileUploadItem.description: Represents an individual file item within the `v-file-upload` component.

VFileUploadList.description: Subcomponent of `v-file-upload` that displays the list of currently selected files.

VForm.description: Standard replacement for `form` HTML element. `v-model` makes it easy to determine if the fields inside are all valid and ready to submit.

VHotkey.description: Visual representation of a keyboard keys combination.

VHover.description: Provides a simple interface for handling hover states for any component.

VIcon.description: Displays an icon from a supported icon set or library.

VIconBtn.description: A lightweight button component meant to hold only the icon.

VImg.description: Standard replacement for `img` HTML element. Supports lazy-loading, blurred placeholders and gradient overlays.

VInfiniteScroll.description: Container that detects when user scrolls to either edge and allows auto-loading more items to show.

VInput.description: A baseline component for building custom field components to work inside `v-form` with validation rules, error messages, typical slots, and loading states.

VItem.description: Provides selection state for a child element within v-item-group.

VItemGroup.description: Functional component meant to interact with `v-item` sub-components to augment any components inside with selection ability.

VKbd.description: Styled element for displaying keyboard keys or shortcuts.

VLabel.description: Used to display a label for form fields.

VLayout.description: A flexible layout wrapper that allows you to scope layout-aware components like `v-main`, `v-footer`, `v-toolbar`, `v-navigation-drawer`, etc.

VLayoutItem.description: Abstract component to use within a `v-layout` or `v-app` container.

VLazy.description: Easy to use wrapper that delays components mount and helps avoid performance overhead of rendering everything at once. Utilizes intersection observer.

VLigatureIcon.description: Renders an icon using a font ligature (e.g. Material Icons).

VList.description: Used to display list-like structures. Supports nested structures.

VListGroup.description: Subcomponent of `v-list` used to display or hide groups of items.

VListImg.description: Image container within a list item.

VListItem.description: Subcomponent of `v-list` used to display a single item or modify the `v-list` state.

VListItemAction.description: Action area (e.g. buttons, toggles) within a v-list-item.

VListItemMedia.description: Media area (e.g. avatar, image) within a v-list-item.

VListSubheader.description: Subcomponent of `v-list` used to separate groups of items.

VLocaleProvider.description: Allows to override global locale for part of the application.

VMain.description: Typically a main content wrapper in `v-app`.

VMenu.description: Shows a popover menu at the position of the element used to activate it.

VMessages.description: Subcomponent of `v-input` used to display validation messages and hints.

VNavigationDrawer.description: Typically used to show application sidebar with navigation.

VNoSsr.description: Prevents its slot content from rendering during server-side rendering.

VNumberInput.description: Replacement for standard HTML number-type input.

VOtpField.description: Sub-component representing a single OTP character field intended for `#fields` slot in VOtpInput

VOtpGroup.description: Sub-component intend for use inside the `#fields` slot of VOtpInput

VOtpInput.description: Used for short one-time codes - typically when authenticating users.

VOtpSeparator.description: Sub-component rendering a visual separator between OTP fields or groups inside the `#fields` slot.

VOverlay.description: The baseline for `v-menu`, `v-dialog` and other components that float over the rest of the page content.

VPagination.description: Navigation component used for paginated sets of data.

VParallax.description: Creates a 3D effect that makes an image appear to scroll slower than the window.

VPicker.description: A baseline component for building various picker components.

VPie.description: Chart component designed to display either pie or a donut chart with integrated tooltips and legend.

VPieSegment.description: Subcomponent for `v-pie` that represents a single segment of the pie chart.

VPieTooltip.description: Subcomponent for `v-pie` that represents the tooltip displayed when hovering over chart segments.

VProgress.description: Unified progress indicator combining accessibility attributes, supporting circular or linear representation with a label and formatted value.

VProgressCircular.description: Used to display progress (0-100 scale) or a loading state.

VProgressLinear.description: Used to display progress (0-100 scale) or a loading state.

VPullToRefresh.description: Allows users to update content with a simple downward swipe on their screen.

VRadio.description: A single radio button, meant to be used within `v-radio-group`.

VRadioGroup.description: A wrapper for `v-radio` components. It manages the selection state.

VRangeSlider.description: Complements the `v-slider` component letting user to pick 2 data points on the linear scale.

VRating.description: A specialized input for showing sequence of icons for the user to express feedback.

VResponsive.description: Can be used to control sizing behavior of any section or set specific aspect ratio.

VRow.description: A layout component used to create a horizontal group of columns with easy control over gap size and alignment.

VScrollXReverseTransition.description: Horizontal scroll transition in the reverse direction (right-to-left entry).

VScrollYReverseTransition.description: Vertical scroll transition in the reverse direction (bottom-to-top entry).

VSelect.description: Replacement for native `<select>` HTML element. Forces selection from the dropdown list without type-ahead.

VSelectionControl.description: Low-level component used by `v-checkbox-btn` and `v-switch` for binary selection with support for indeterminate state as well.

VSelectionControlGroup.description: Groups multiple selection controls (checkboxes or radios) with shared validation and layout.

VSheet.description: Represents section within the application that is a good alternative to `v-card` most of the time.

VSkeletonLoader.description: Provides a straightforward loading placeholders in your application. Modern alternative to generic loading spinners.

VSlideGroup.description: Used to display scrollable items. Supports horizontal and vertical orientation.

VSlideGroupItem.description: Selectable item within v-slide-group, providing active state management.

VSlideXReverseTransition.description: Horizontal slide transition in the reverse direction.

VSlideYReverseTransition.description: Vertical slide transition in the reverse direction.

VSlider.description: Form input used to select single number from the linear range. A simple alternative to a standard number input.

VSnackbar.description: Used to display a quick message or notification to a user. Supports positioning, auto-dismiss with timeout, and a dedicated slot for action.

VSnackbarQueue.description: Used to control and display a sequence of messages to the user.

VSpacer.description: Fills available space within flex containers such as toolbars and card actions.

VSparkline.description: Chart component used to create simple line or bars.

VSparklineTooltip.description: Subcomponent for `v-sparkline` that renders the tooltip displayed when hovering over data points.

VSpeedDial.description: Typically combined with `v-fab` to reveal additional actions when clicked.

VStepper.description: Displays multi-step sequence expecting user to interact with every panel individually.

VStepperActions.description: Subcomponent for `v-stepper` that represents the step action controls.

VStepperHeader.description: Subcomponent for `v-stepper` that represents the step header.

VStepperItem.description: Subcomponent for `v-stepper` that represents an individual step.

VStepperVertical.description: Guides users through a sequence of steps. Same as `v-stepper`, but for vertical orientation.

VStepperVerticalActions.description: Navigation buttons (next/previous) for a vertical stepper item.

VStepperVerticalItem.description: Subcomponent for `v-stepper-vertical` that represents an individual step item.

VSvgIcon.description: Renders an icon from an inline SVG path or element.

VSwitch.description: Provides users the ability to choose between two distinct values. Typically used as an on/off switch. Supports indeterminate and loading states.

VSystemBar.description: Status bar representing Android system bar - used for UI mocks.

VTab.description: Represents single tab inside `v-tabs`. Wrapper of `v-btn`.

VTable.description: Replacement for native `<table>` HTML element. Lightweight alternative to `v-data-table`.

VTabs.description: Used to organize content across different screens, data sets, and other interactions.

VTabsWindow.description: Container for tab panel content, synced with v-tabs selection.

VTextField.description: Form component used for collecting single-line text.

VTextarea.description: Form component used for collecting multi-line text.

VThemeProvider.description: Allows to override theme for a part of the application.

VTimePicker.description: A picker for selecting time: hours, minutes and optionally seconds.

VTimePickerClock.description: Subcomponent for `v-time-picker` that provides the clock interface for selecting time.

VTimePickerControls.description: Subcomponent for `v-time-picker` that provides the controls for selecting hours, minutes, seconds, and AM/PM.

VTimelineItem.description: Subcomponent for `v-timeline` that provides an individual timeline item.

VToolbar.description: Pivotal to any graphical user interface (GUI), as it generally is the primary source of site navigation.

VToolbarItems.description: Groups action items within v-toolbar with consistent styling.

VToolbarTitle.description: Title text area within v-toolbar or v-app-bar.

VTooltip.description: Displays brief informational text when users hover over or focus on an element.

VTreeview.description: Useful for displaying nested uniform data.

VTreeviewGroup.description: Subcomponent for `v-treeview` used to display a single treeview node’s children.

VTreeviewItem.description: Subcomponent for `v-treeview` used to display a single treeview node.

VValidation.description: Headless validation wrapper for building custom form inputs with Vuetify's validation system.

VVideo.description: Used for background video or a standalone player for self-hosted media files.

VVideoControls.description: Subcomponent for `v-video` used to display a video player controls.

VVideoVolume.description: Subcomponent for `v-video` used to display a volume control.

VVirtualScroll.description: Displays a virtualized container where only subset of items is actually rendered in the DOM. Yields massive performance gains when used correctly.

VWindow.description: Provides the baseline functionality for transitioning content from one pane to another.

VWindowItem.description: Subcomponent for `v-window` used to display a single panel/slide.
